failures.description: The agent incorrectly answered that the item does not have bagged/bagless=bagged even though the catalog result explicitly shows "bagged/bagless": "bagged".
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available before the failure: ProductCatalogSearch returned item 1345513440 with options including "bagged/bagless": "bagged". At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer "No, it does not," which directly contradicts that tool output. This is not an invalid tool call, missing information, unsupported intent, or guardrail/system issue. The agent had the evidence and misread or misreasoned from it.
